title: Folding Chair Dolly
features: Our folding chair dolly holds a variety of the folding chairs for sale at EventStable.com.
It will hold approximately 50 plastic folding chairs or 25 wood or resin folding chairs.
Buy one for each stack of chairs to keep them off the floor and transport quickly and easily.
This cart has heavy duty 5" casters with 2 fixed and 2 swivel wheels.
The commercial grade frame will hold up to 600 lbs.
Specifications: Width: 19" Length: 44" Frame Height: 8" Weight: 40 lbs.
